name: Shimo eGift Card
title: 14% off
subtitle: Enjoy 14% off
merchant_editorial: Yakiniku (??? or ??), meaning "grilled meat", is a Japanese term that in its broadest sense refers to grilled meat cuisine. "Yakiniku" originally referred to western "barbecue" food; today, "yakiniku" commonly refers to a style of cooking bite-sized meat (usually Wagyu beef and offal) and vegetables on gridirons or griddles over a flame of wood charcoals carbonized by dry distillation (sumibi, ??) or a gas/electric grill. It is one of the most popular national dishes of Japan which is served with grace at Shimo in the heart of Brisbane. In many parts of the world, yakiniku is also commonly referred to as "Japanese barbecue".

merchant_editorial:
From humble beginnings, opening as Waterline Café, a coffee and sandwich bar in the corner of the new Keppel Bay Marina building in 1996, The Waterline Restaurant as it is known today has forged a reputation for the best quality food and friendliest service on the coast.

It has taken three kitchen renovations, to grow the business to what it is today. The most recent in 2005 when Executive Chef Matt Smith joined the team and introduced evening dining, taking The Waterline Restaurant to the next level.

The Waterline Restaurant’s concept in food is to provide a variety of fresh flavours by handcrafting all our products purely from nature.

The food is a harmony of all the finest ingredients found locally and around the world. Seasonal produce is obtained from local fruit, vegetable and seafood markets and the beef is produced on our family cattle properties. name: Gemelli Broadbeach eGift Card
title: 14% off
subtitle: Enjoy 14% off
merchant_editorial:
Gemelli simply translates from Italian to twins, which is exactly what we are. Coming from a family of Italian heritage we were brought up to appreciate good food and most importantly, how to cook it! Whether it be the annual sauce and salami making with Nonno, or simply sharing a glass of wine with family and friends, we have always had a passion for Italian food and culture.

With mostly all imported products from Italy, we have created a menu which is food we love to eat at home. Being a Queensland based restaurant has leveraged us the to access the highest quality of fresh seafood and meat, allowing magic to flourish into the dishes. All our pasta is made fresh, in-house fresh daily with 00 flour & free-range eggs. Our pizza is woodfired and cooked in a traditional way. Along with our food our wine list has also been awarded “One Glass” by Gourmet Traveller Wine Magazine with a range of high quality imported and local Australian wine.

Our rustic setting coupled with a vibrant atmosphere gives you the unique experience of our modern Italian establishment. A combination of traditional methods and modern flair has allowed us to design a menu influenced by the many diverse regions of Italy, to deliver the best of Italian culture to Broadbeach.

We would love for you to come & join us and enjoy the fresh, distinct flavours that Gemelli has to offer. Salute!
